title: Expand Experience page to full reverse-chronological timeline
description:
Refresh `content/experience/index.md` to a full reverse-chronological timeline of all 12 roles. Currently has only GoodHabitz, plus stale framing.

**Sources of truth:**
- TMC CV (`/Users/arturbdr/Downloads/TMC Digital IT CV - Artur Drummond.docx`) — full STAR-detail per role, all 12 roles back to 2007
- PDF CV (`/Users/arturbdr/Downloads/Artur Drummond - CV.pdf`) — tighter framing, current Huspy role first, condensed earlier roles

**Format per entry (proposed):**
- H2: role title
- Bold lead: `**Company** | Period | Location · Industry`
- 2-3 sentence summary of what was built / scope of the role (drawn from PDF where present, TMC where the PDF is condensed)

**Roles to include (most recent first):**
1. Huspy — Tech Lead, Core Team — 2025–Present (Dubai, Remote)
2. GoodHabitz — Senior Backend Architect — Jul 2022 – Jun 2025 (Eindhoven, Hybrid)
3. Jumbo — Principal Engineer — Aug 2018 – Jun 2022 (Eindhoven; via WAES until 2020)
4. Netshoes — Software Architect (Java) — Apr 2016 – Jul 2018 (Brazil)
5. IBM Brasil — Senior System Architect / Senior Java Architect — Mar 2015 – Mar 2016
6. Smiles — Java Solution Architect — Sep 2014 – Mar 2015
7. Cielo — Java Development Specialist — Mar 2014 – Sep 2014
8. Capgemini — Java Technical Leader — Aug 2012 – Mar 2014
9. Autbank — Java System Analyst — Dec 2010 – Mar 2012
10. BV Financeira — Java System Analyst — Oct 2009 – Nov 2010
11. Autbank — Java System Analyst — Sep 2008 – Oct 2009
12. Amdocs — Junior Java System Analyst — Jul 2007 – Sep 2008

Roles 9-12 may be condensed into a single "Earlier experience" line (matching the PDF style) to keep the page scannable.

**Acceptance:**
- Page lists all 12 roles (or 8 detailed + earlier-experience condensation), reverse-chronological
- Current Huspy role at the top (Experience page currently still shows GoodHabitz as current)
- `hugo --minify` builds clean, `/experience/` route renders with title "Experience"
- No orphan "GoodHabitz | July 2022 - Present" framing — that's outdated

**Open question to confirm with operator before applying:**
- Detailed for all 12 roles, or detailed for the 8 most recent + an "Earlier experience" condensation line covering Autbank/BV Financeira/Autbank/Amdocs (matches the PDF style).
notes: Experience page rewritten as 4 detailed roles (Huspy/GoodHabitz/Jumbo/Netshoes) + 'Earlier experience' condensation line for IBM Brasil/Smiles/Cielo/Capgemini/Autbank/BV Financeira/Amdocs (matches PDF style). Lead intro links to /projects/. Removed stale 'GoodHabitz | July 2022 - Present' framing — Huspy is now correctly at the top. Verified build clean.

title: Refresh About page using PDF intro and skills
description:
Refresh `content/about/index.md` using the PDF CV (`/Users/arturbdr/Downloads/Artur Drummond - CV.pdf`) as the source of truth for the intro and skills.

**Changes:**
- Replace the opening 3 paragraphs with the PDF Profile paragraph (Backend engineer / 18 years / RFCs, internal libraries, cross-platform integrations / ~20 engineers at Huspy / Tech Lead, Core Team / previously Senior Backend Architect at GoodHabitz reporting to the CTO).
- Add the PDF's "Looking for" line as a second short paragraph (Staff Engineer or Tech Lead role / keeps defining architecture and stays close to the code).
- Replace the "Technical Expertise" bullet list with the PDF's 7-group CORE SKILLS layout (Languages / Backend / Architecture & Leadership / Cloud & Infra / Data / Observability & Quality / Ways of working).
- Drop the "Key Focus Areas" section entirely — generic subheaders that the new opener already covers.
- Drop the closing "I believe great solutions come from clear communication..." paragraph.
- Add a short "Languages" section: Portuguese (native), English (fluent), Dutch (basic; working toward fluency by end of 2026), Spanish (basic).
- Update `title` if needed to stay aligned with the menu label ("About").

**Acceptance:**
- `content/about/index.md` content matches the PDF's framing
- "17+ years" no longer appears anywhere — replaced with "18 years"
- `hugo --minify` builds clean, `/about/` route renders correctly with title "About"

**Open question to confirm with operator before applying:**
- Whether to keep the explicit "Strangler Pattern / Event Sourcing" mention from the current About (one of the few concrete bits in the existing copy not directly in the PDF Profile).
notes: About page rewritten using PDF profile + 'Looking for' line + 7-group CORE SKILLS + Languages section. Dropped Key Focus Areas, closing fluff paragraph, and the Strangler/Event-Sourcing narrative line (Strangler stays on the Architecture & Leadership skills row). Verified build clean, /about/ renders correctly with title 'About Me'.

title: Refresh content pages from CV (Contact, Projects, Experience, About)
description:
Refresh the four content pages using the TMC CV as the source of truth (see /Users/arturbdr/Downloads/TMC Digital IT CV - Artur Drummond.docx).

**Pages to update:**
- [ ] `content/contact/index.md` — currently shows experience content; replace with proper contact page (email, LinkedIn, GitHub, location, short intro)
- [ ] `content/projects/index.md` — currently shows experience content; replace with 4-5 selected projects as STAR-lite blocks (Huspy Document Service, Huspy JWT library/BFF, GoodHabitz LTI 1.3, Jumbo OMS strangling, Netshoes Checkout)
- [ ] `content/experience/index.md` — only has GoodHabitz; expand to full timeline of 12 roles back to 2007
- [ ] `content/about/index.md` — update "17+ years" to "19+", reframe for Staff/Principal scope per CV

**Approach (per user request):** Draft one page at a time in the order Contact → Projects → Experience → About. Each draft reviewed by user before moving to next.

**Acceptance:** All four pages render correctly under their respective routes (verified via `hugo --minify` build + visual check), titles match the route name, content is accurate to CV.
notes:
Contact page done. Replaced experience content with intro + email/LinkedIn/GitHub/location bullets. Verified rendering via 'make build' — clean, title is now Contact, all links render correctly. Moving to Projects.
Contact (✓) and Projects (✓ + Crowdin addition) are done. About and Experience are split out as separate issues per operator request. Closing this umbrella.

title: Audit and remove any committed credentials
description:
Audit the repository for accidentally committed credentials (API keys, tokens, passwords, AWS keys, private keys, .env contents, etc.) and remove anything found.

**Scope:**
- Working tree (all files, including dotfiles)
- Hugo content (`content/`), config (`hugo.toml`), workflows (`.github/`)
- Theme submodule is out of scope (third-party, but spot-check anyway)
- `.beads/` artefacts (newly created — confirm no secrets)
- Git history (`git log -p` / `git rev-list --all` grep) — flag anything historical even if removed today

**Patterns to grep:**
- `api[_-]?key`, `token`, `secret`, `password`, `passwd`, `bearer`
- AWS: `AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}`, `aws_secret_access_key`
- GitHub: `ghp_`, `gho_`, `ghu_`, `ghs_`, `ghr_`
- Generic: `BEGIN PRIVATE KEY`, `BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY`
- `.env` files committed to git

**Acceptance:**
- A short report listing what was searched and any findings
- If nothing found, confirm clean
- If anything found: redact in working tree, document the leak (provider + rotate-by date) for the operator to rotate, and flag whether history rewrite is required

**Notes:**
- This is a public personal-site repo, so leaked credentials are immediately exposed once pushed
notes: Audit complete. Searched: (1) tracked-file filenames for .env/secret/credential/.pem/.key/id_rsa/password — no hits; (2) tracked-file content (excluding themes/) for api_key/secret/bearer/password regex, AWS AKIA pattern, GitHub PAT prefixes (ghp_/gho_/ghu_/ghs_/ghr_), OpenAI sk- prefix, Slack xox prefixes, BEGIN PRIVATE KEY markers — no hits; (3) full git history (git log --all -p) for the same patterns — no hits; (4) git log for .env file additions — none ever committed. Only 'token' hit was 'id-token: write' in .github/workflows/hugo.yml, which is a GitHub Actions OIDC permission grant required by actions/deploy-pages@v4, not a credential. Out-of-scope finding (content bug, not security): content/contact/index.md contains the Experience page content with title 'Experience' instead of contact info — flag for separate fix.

title: Add Makefile with project commands
description:
Add a `Makefile` at the repo root with the common Hugo and project commands so they can be invoked as `make <target>` instead of memorising the underlying CLI.

**Targets to include (minimum):**
- `start` — `hugo server -D`
- `start-drafts` — `hugo server -D --buildDrafts`
- `build` — `hugo --minify`
- `clean` — remove `public/` and other build artefacts
- `theme-update` — bump the `hugo-coder` submodule
- `theme-init` — initialise submodules on a fresh clone
- `version` — show local Hugo version
- `help` — list available targets (default target)

**Acceptance:**
- `make help` lists every target with a one-line description
- Each target works on a clean macOS shell
- `Makefile` is committed to repo root

**References:**
- Existing dev commands documented in `CLAUDE.md` Build & Run section
- Hugo invocations are the same as documented in `.claude/rules/architecture.md`
notes: Created Makefile at repo root with targets: help (default), start, start-drafts, build, clean, theme-init, theme-update, version. Help target uses awk auto-discovery from '## ' annotations. PORT and HUGO are overridable env vars (e.g., PORT=1234 make start). Verified locally: make help lists all 8 targets, make version prints Hugo 0.160.1, make clean + make build runs cleanly (12 pages, 7 static files). Also updated CLAUDE.md Build & Run section to reference make targets and added Makefile to the Key Configuration Files list.

title: Bump Hugo from 0.139.3 to 0.160.1
description:
Bump pinned Hugo version in `.github/workflows/hugo.yml` from `0.139.3` to `0.160.1` (latest as of 2026-04-27, see https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/latest).

**Acceptance:**
- `.github/workflows/hugo.yml` references `hugo-version: '0.160.1'`
- `hugo --minify` runs cleanly locally on the same version
- Spot-check rendered pages (about, experience, projects, contact) for theme regressions

**Notes:**
- Local Homebrew Hugo is already on `v0.160.1+extended+withdeploy` (verified 2026-04-27)
- Hugo extended is required (see `.claude/rules/architecture.md`)
notes: Bumped .github/workflows/hugo.yml hugo-version from 0.139.3 to 0.160.1 (latest as of 2026-04-27). Verified by running 'hugo --minify' locally on Hugo v0.160.1+extended+withdeploy: clean build, 12 pages rendered, generator meta tag confirms 0.160.1, footer + nav links all OK. Also updated stale version references in CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules/architecture.md, and .claude/rules/deployment.md.
